aiDescription.summary: The "Update Assemblies Miva Product ID" import is designed to update records in NetSuite of the "assemblyitem" record type. It is a distributed import, meaning it will be processed in multiple batches for faster import. The import uses a lookup based on the "nameinternal" field to determine if a record already exists in NetSuite. The import will update the "custitem_hb_miva_product_id" field with the value of the "id" field from the source data, the "custitem_hb_miva_product_code" field with the value of the "code" field, and set the "celigo_ignore_mandatory_fields" field to "true" for all records being imported. It will not create multiple records from a single parent record, and it will not ignore existing or missing data. The import is using the NetSuiteDistributedImport adaptor type.
aiDescription.detailed:
This import is named "Update Assemblies Miva Product ID" and it is a distributed import, which means it will be processed in multiple batches for faster import. 

The import is configured to update records in NetSuite of the "assemblyitem" record type. 

To determine if a record already exists in NetSuite, the import uses a lookup based on the "nameinternal" field, which should match the value of the "sku" field in the source data. 

The import will update the following fields in NetSuite: 
- The "custitem_hb_miva_product_id" field will be updated with the value of the "id" field from the source data. 
- The "custitem_hb_miva_product_code" field will be updated with the value of the "code" field from the source data. 
- The "celigo_ignore_mandatory_fields" field will be set to "true" for all records being imported. 

The import will not create multiple records from a single parent record (oneToMany is set to false). 

Existing data will not be ignored (ignoreExisting is set to false). 

Missing data will not be ignored (ignoreMissing is set to false). 

The import is using the NetSuiteDistributedImport adaptor type.
